    H

    handleBroadConsentEntries(Bundle, List, ServerTypeEnum) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ResourceHandler
    Processes all Broad Consent entries from the bundle, including revoked or otherwise non-valid entries.
    handleConditionEntries(Bundle, List, Set, Set, ServerTypeEnum) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ResourceHandler
    Reads the Fhir bundle, adds all entries of the Condition type to a list and adds the patient ids and encounter ids to a given set.
    handleConditionEntriesWithEncounterRefSetting(List, List, Set, Set, ServerTypeEnum) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ResourceHandler
    Set the Encounter id in the condition resources and add the patient and encounter ids to the passed lists.
    handleConsentEntries(Bundle, List, Collection, Set, ServerTypeEnum) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ResourceHandler
     
    handleFilterPatientRetrieval(DataItemContext, Boolean, List, List) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.services.AbstractDataRetrievalService
    If a patient filter is activated, use the corresponding one.
    handleObservationEntries(Bundle, Collection, Set, Set, ServerTypeEnum) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ResourceHandler
    Reads the Fhir bundle, adds all entries of the Observation type to a list and adds the patient ids and encounter ids to a given set.
